query:
-- Find the 49 hot projects with only llm_inferred contacts and no send_ready
-- Reset their projectEnrichmentCache so tonight's pipeline will re-run Apollo search on them
DELETE FROM projectEnrichmentCache
WHERE projectId IN (
  SELECT p.id
  FROM projects p
  JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
  JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
  WHERE p.priority = 'hot'
    AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active'
    AND p.suppressed = 0
    AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM contacts c2 JOIN contactProjects cp2 ON cp2.contactId = c2.id
      WHERE cp2.projectId = p.id AND c2.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready'
    )
  GROUP BY p.id
  HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier != 'llm_inferred' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0
);

-- Verify how many cache entries were cleared
SELECT ROW_COUNT() as cache_entries_cleared;

-- Find the 49 hot projects with only llm_inferred contacts and no send_ready
-- Reset their projectEnrichmentCache so tonight's pipeline will re-run Apollo search on them
DELETE FROM projectEnrichmentCache
WHERE projectId IN (
  SELECT p.id
  FROM projects p
  JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
  JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
  WHERE p.priority = 'hot'
    AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active'
    AND p.suppressed = 0
    AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM contacts c2 JOIN contactProjects cp2 ON cp2.contactId = c2.id
      WHERE cp2.projectId = p.id AND c2.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready'
    )
  GROUP BY p.id
  HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier != 'llm_inferred' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0
);

-- Verify how many cache entries were cleared
SELECT ROW_COUNT() as cache_entries_cleared;
